root.speaker: Drev the Cultist
root.text:
He believed it, you understand. He wrote it on every
page he could find. The fire ate most of them.

what.speaker: Drev the Cultist
what.text:
That he would be the one to keep what the realm
couldn't lose. He called himself 'the Hoarder.' The
name is on the half-page.

was.speaker: Drev the Cultist
was.text: The realm lost him. So no.

who.speaker: Drev the Cultist
who.text:
Khorgaul. Before he was the burned thing. Before the
Hoarder ate the man.

props.message:
Half a page. Legible:

'I will keep what the realm cannot lose.'

Charred edges. The legible portion is in a careful, even
hand — the hand of someone who took his time.
